---
title: "Portfolio"
description: |
  A curated collection of case studies demonstrating my end-to-end research process—from strategic planning and methodological design to analysis, visualization, and industry-ready implications.
listing:
  - id: case-studies
    contents: "../projects/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [title, description, date, categories, image]
    date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
    image-height: "200px"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    output-file: index.html
---

:::{#case-studies}
:::
